fileContext.overview: OllamaProvider is an LLM provider that connects to a locally-running Ollama instance.

symbols.name: OllamaProvider
symbols.purpose: LLM provider for locally-running Ollama instance
symbols.behavior: Handles API requests and responses to provide LLM functionality
symbols.limitations: Requires Ollama instance to be running

symbols.name: complete
symbols.purpose: Completes a conversation with the LLM
symbols.behavior: Sends a request to the Ollama API and returns the response
symbols.limitations: May throw errors if API request fails

symbols.name: readStream
symbols.purpose: Reads an NDJSON stream from the Ollama API
symbols.behavior: Parses the stream and returns the LLM response
symbols.limitations: May throw errors if stream parsing fails
